name: Chilled Avocado Soup with Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, pit, and cube the avocados.
2. Puree the avocados in a blender or food processor until smooth.
3. Add the chicken stock, buttermilk, lemon juice, lemon peel, and garlic to the blended avocados. Process until smooth.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
6. Rinse and drain the shrimp.
7. Ladle the soup into chilled bowls and garnish with shrimp and parsley.
8. Serve with a wedge of lemon.
